inputs.name: collapseOverflow
inputs.description: Whether to move tabs overflowing in the tab bar to the dropdown

inputs.name: collapsibleTabs
inputs.description: Whether to enable collapsing expanded tab on expanded tab click

inputs.name: defaultTab
inputs.description: Initially selected tab (by id). First not disabled one if not specified.

inputs.name: focusFirstFocusableElement
inputs.description: Whether to focus the first focusable element in a tab panel when using stacked tabs.

inputs.name: maxVisibleTabs
inputs.description:
Limits the maximum number of tabs visible in the tab bar in collapseOverflow mode.
Other tabs will be moved to the collapsed tabs dropdown

inputs.name: mode
inputs.description:
Whether user wants to use tab component in certain mode. Modes available:
'icon-only' | 'process' | 'filter'

inputs.name: selectDefaultOnTabsChange
inputs.description: Whether to try to keep selected tab (default value) on tabs change or to select default one (first if not specified).

inputs.name: size
inputs.description: Size of tab, it's mostly about adding spacing on tab container, available sizes 's' | 'm' | 'l' | 'xl' | 'xxl'

inputs.name: stackContent
inputs.description: Whether to open tab content one under another without collapsing

outputs.name: hiddenItemsCount
outputs.description: Event emitted when hidden items count has been changed.

outputs.name: selectedTabChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when the selected panel changes.

outputs.name: selectedTabIndexChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when the selected panel index changes.

outputs.name: visibleItemsCount
outputs.description: Event emitted when visible items count has been changed.
